channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Enhancing adolescent social and emotional well-being
item.description: Enhancing adolescent social and emotional well-being by Centre for Well-Being, Inclusion, Sustainability and Equal Opportunity has an embargo on Wednesday 8 July 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Well-Being, Inclusion, Sustainability and Equal Opportunity

item.title: Skills in the AI age
item.description: Skills in the AI age by Directorate for Science, Technology and Industry has an embargo on Wednesday 8 July 2026 at 7:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Science, Technology and Industry

item.title: Trends in Global Value Chains
item.description: Trends in Global Value Chains by Trade and Agriculture Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 9 July 2026 at 11:00.
item.oe:directorate: Trade and Agriculture Directorate

item.title: Tax Co-operation for Development 2025 - Progress report
item.description: Tax Co-operation for Development 2025 - Progress report by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Thursday 9 July 2026 at 11:00.

item.title: OECD Anti-Bribery Convention Phase 4 Follow-Up Report on Türkiye - Implementing the Convention and Related Legal Instruments

item.title: Cost-effective Active Labour Market Policies - Considering employment and social outcomes
item.description: Cost-effective Active Labour Market Policies - Considering employment and social outcomes by Directorate for Employment, Labour and Social Affairs has an embargo on Monday 13 July 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: The spectrum of regulatory models and its application to the digital economy
item.description: The spectrum of regulatory models and its application to the digital economy by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Wednesday 15 July 2026 at 0:01.

item.description: Flexibility and investor protection in share class structures by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Wednesday 15 July 2026 at 0:01.

item.description: Environmental Tax Policy Review of Romania - Policy Options for Buildings and Transport by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Thursday 16 July 2026 at 8:00.

item.title: Gender and trust in public institutions in Switzerland - An analysis of the determinants
item.description: Gender and trust in public institutions in Switzerland - An analysis of the determinants by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Friday 17 July 2026 at 0:01.

item.description: Generative AI experimentation in government - Learning from emerging guidelines by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Saturday 18 July 2026 at 0:01.
